metadata.title: Neuronix AI — Integrating Intelligence Into Business Processes
metadata.description: Neuronix AI — AI-powered business automation agency in Ukraine. Voice AI agents, chatbots, n8n workflows, web applications. Automate your business with artificial intelligence.

hero.subtitle: AI automation for small and medium business — voice agents, chatbots, websites, n8n workflows

items.title: Voice AI Agents
items.description: Automated calls and incoming call handling. Order confirmation, surveys, support — 24/7 without managers.

items.title: Chatbots
items.description: Intelligent bots for Telegram, Viber, websites. Answer questions, take orders, manage CRM.

items.title: Web Applications
items.description: Landing pages, admin panels, dashboards. React, Next.js, TypeScript — fast, beautiful, turnkey.

items.title: n8n Automation
items.description: Connect CRM, messengers, databases, AI into a single workflow. No manual work.

items.title: AI Content
items.description: Generate descriptions, banners, email campaigns with AI. Personalized for each client.

items.title: Integrations
items.description: APIs for 1C, OpenCart, Horoshop, KeyCRM, Binotel, SalesDrive. Data synchronization between systems.

items.title: Abertime — Watch Catalog
items.problem: Manual updating of 15,000+ products between 1C, OpenCart, and marketplaces
items.solution: n8n workflow for auto-sync + admin panel for managing promotions and banners

items.title: Cornix — SportVida Voice Agent
items.problem: Managers spent 2+ hours daily confirming orders by phone
items.solution: Vapi-based AI agent automatically calls clients, confirms orders, updates CRM

items.title: BESPORT — Call Analytics
items.problem: No quality control for sports club managers' calls
items.solution: Deepgram transcription + Claude AI analysis + Telegram reports for management

items.title: WaterDelivery — Water Delivery
items.problem: Chaotic orders via phone, Excel spreadsheets, lost requests
items.solution: AI voice agent for order intake + CRM with delivery route management

items.title: Banner Automation — Banner Generation
items.problem: Designer spent 30+ minutes on each promotional banner for the website
items.solution: Python + Pillow automatically generates banners from 1C data, publishes via n8n

items.title: WOD Champ — CrossFit Tracker
items.problem: Athletes recorded results in notebooks, trainers had no analytics
items.solution: Telegram Mini App with Supabase backend — WOD logging, leaderboards, history

about.title: Why Neuronix?
about.description: Neuronix is an AI automation agency in Ukraine specializing in business process automation using artificial intelligence. We build voice AI agents, chatbots, workflow systems, and web applications that replace routine work and operate 24/7.

items.quote: Neuronix automated the synchronization of our 15,000-watch catalog. Now everything updates automatically — prices, availability, promotions. It used to take an entire day.
items.author: Abertime

items.quote: The AI agent calls clients and confirms orders for us. Managers are finally focused on sales, not routine. ROI paid off in the first month.
items.author: SportVida

items.quote: Finally a proper order system instead of Excel chaos. AI takes calls, CRM distributes routes. Clients are happy, so are we.
items.author: WaterDelivery

items.question: Who provides AI automation services in Ukraine?
items.answer: Neuronix AI is a Ukrainian AI agency specializing in business process automation. We build voice AI agents, chatbots, n8n workflows, and web applications for small and medium businesses.

items.question: What does an AI automation agency do?
items.answer: An AI agency develops artificial intelligence solutions for business: voice agents for automated calls, chatbots for customer support, routine process automation through workflow systems, analytics, and CRM integration.

items.question: How can voice AI agents help my business?
items.answer: Voice AI agents automatically call clients to confirm orders, conduct surveys, handle incoming calls 24/7. This reduces manager workload by 70% and speeds up order processing.

items.question: How much does AI automation cost?
items.answer: Cost depends on project complexity. A simple chatbot starts from $500, voice agent from $1000, comprehensive automation with CRM from $2000. First consultation is free.

items.question: What technologies does Neuronix use?
items.answer: We work with n8n, Vapi, Supabase, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Claude AI, Deepgram, Telegram Bot API, OpenCart, 1C, KeyCRM, Binotel, SalesDrive, and other platforms.
